task: Long bios overflow the profile card layout. Truncate bios to at most 200 characters in profile_card.py.
correctness_argument: Slicing at the string level (`bio[:200]`) operates on Unicode code points. The result is always a well-formed string of at most 200 characters regardless of per-character byte width. No multi-byte sequence can be split and no UnicodeDecodeError can occur.
